tours.TourName: France, Swiss & Italy 11 days 9 nights [FRIT11]
tours.TourSummary:
LUXURY BOUTIQUE SMALL GROUP, ENJOY A PREMIUM EXPERIENCE
Highlights of the Itinerary：
-	Limited to 25 people for a comfortable small group tour
-	Depart from Paris, end in Rome, say no to long-distance coach travel
-	Accommodation in high-quality four-star hotels throughout the journey
-	Tour fee includes tickets for important attractions included in the itinerary
-	Paris, starting with the magnificent view from the Eiffel Tower, experience the artistic atmosphere of the Louvre
-	Versailles, explore its grand palace and exquisite gardens
-	Milan‘s fashion avenues and Gothic cathedrals await your visit
-	In Lucerne, you will step into a corridor of time
-	At Lake Como, experience the tranquility and romance of the Italian Lake District
-	Venice‘s canals and historic buildings showcase the unique Italian style
-	The colorful houses and sea views of Cinque Terre are unforgettable
-	The Renaissance art and historical relics of Florence await your exploration
-	The ancient Roman ruins in Rome will perfectly conclude your journey

tours.TourName: Unesco World Heritage in Korea with Seoul 10 Days 9 Nights [24MV-CB203]
tours.TourSummary:
UNESCO world heritage of Korea refers to both cultural and natural heritage sites registered on its world heritage list.
Since the earliest settlements on the Korean Peninsula and in Southeastern Manchuria during prehistoric times, the people of Korea have developed a distinctive culture based on their unique artistic sensibility. The geographical conditions of the peninsula provided Koreans with opportunities to receive both continental and maritime cultures and ample resources, which in turn enabled them to form unique cultures of interest and value for humanity, both then and now. Korea’s vibrant cultural legacy, comprising art, literature, dance, architecture, clothing and cuisine, offers a delightful combination of tradition and modernity, and is now appreciated in many parts of the world. The volcanic island of Jeju-do has been chosen as UNESCO natural heritage for its outstandingly beautiful and natural environment that is significant for its geological features and ecological value.
This tour takes you to visit almost World Heritage in Korea designated by UNESCO in culture, nature and intangible culture.

tours.TourName: Kuala Lumpur-Langkawi of Malaysia 6 Days 5 Nights Tour [24MV-KUL6A]
tours.TourSummary:
Kuala Lumpur
The origin of the name is “Muddy Confluence”, where two rivers -the Klang River & the Gombak River- meet. The city is also known as KL & represents a true kaleidoscope of different cultures, customs & cuisines.

Langkawi Island
Langkawi features some of the most beautiful beaches in all of Malaysia. It is known as the Jewel of Kedah and is surrounded by another 99 smaller islands.

Boracay
Boracay’s beauty with its unparalleled powdery white beaches is one of the most popular holiday destinations in the Philippines.
